headline: U.S. supplies a third of world’s LNG but only 3% of global oil exports
summary: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) CEO Chad Zamarin made a point recently that cuts through a lot of noise about U.S. energy dominance. The numbers he laid out reveal a structural asymmetry that most investors haven’t fully priced in. “The United States is the largest exporter of natural gas. We export a third of global LNG supplies. ... U.S. supplies a third of world’s LNG but only 3% of global oil exports

headline: Williams CEO: U.S. natural gas production is America’s true superpower
summary: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) CEO Chad Zamarin went on live television recently and made a case that cuts through the geopolitical noise around energy markets. His argument is simple, backed by hard numbers, and worth understanding for anyone following energy markets. “Natural gas production in the United States is truly our country’s superpower.
